---
title: "fit_xyey"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/fit_xyey.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xyey.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `ansatz` {#ansatz}

```python
def ansatz(x, params)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xyey.py#L12){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_correlated_matches_uncorrelated` {#test_correlated_matches_uncorrelated}

```python
def test_correlated_matches_uncorrelated()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xyey.py#L30){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_recovers_exact_omega` {#test_recovers_exact_omega}

```python
def test_recovers_exact_omega()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xyey.py#L38){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
